name: ai-evolution-platform-docs
description: Enterprise AI Evolution & Maturity Platform — documentation portal and generator
author: Vijayagopalan Raveendran

scripts.check:docs: node build-docs.js && git diff --exit-code --stat docs/ || (echo '\n✗ Docs are out of date. Run: npm run build:docs, then commit the regenerated docs/*.html' && exit 1)
scripts.hooks:install: git config core.hooksPath .githooks && echo 'Git hooks installed (.githooks).'
